sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35018" key="e)na=ro/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνᾶρόω</orth>, <sense id="n35018.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plough in</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῇ γῇ σπέρμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1147.tlg001:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antipho Soph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
